definition: Reported accumulation of solid waste affecting public health risk
notes: Keep separate from sanitation if source permits

definition: Reported sewage overflow or exposure affecting living areas
score_rule: 0=low or not reported;1=reported exposure;2=widespread or severe exposure

definition: Reported pest or vector conditions relevant to environmental health
notes: Do not infer disease burden from pest report alone

definition: Access to functional health facility or service point
notes: May require spatial join if facility coordinates available

definition: Availability of mobile clinic or emergency medical service coverage
notes: Code cautiously when absence reflects missing data

definition: Reported electricity or fuel limitation affecting services
notes: Keep source wording in extraction notes

definition: Reported constraint affecting service delivery or repair access
notes: Do not include tactical or sensitive route detail

definition: Concentration of displaced population by area or site
Reported limitation in household or site-level access to sufficient water
notes: Use only values with date-stamped source support

definition: Reported disruption in sanitation service availability or function
notes: Document whether value is direct or coded from narrative
